text: - (b) Final payment, within thirty (30) days after the final retention payment is received by Contractor from Owner provided the Subcontractor has executed and delivered to Contractor a General Release, in form satisfactory to Contractor and has furnished evidence satisfactory to Contractor that the Subcontractor's obligations to its sub- subcontractors, vendors and suppliers have been fully discharged and that the premises are free from all liens or other claims chargeable to the premises or the Subcontractor as a result of this Subcontract.
